component.name: SClient
component.summary: Customizable cross-platform desktop client for SoundCloud

description.p: SClient is a beautiful, highly customizable, and feature-rich desktop client for SoundCloud. It bridges the gap between the web player and native desktop experiences by providing seamless integration with MPRIS, hardware media keys, and Discord Rich Presence.
Enjoy true ad-blocking, custom theming, and an untethered listening experience designed exclusively for SoundCloud enthusiasts.
